subject: OWL Cycle 1 ping — all clear, standing by
body:
Bull — OWL here. Cycle 1 check-in.

No new messages from you since the weather test ack. All items remain:
- Photo-to-Claim Phases 1-3 complete, awaiting Phase 4
- Security Audit P0 — ready to coordinate
- IT Courses rebuild — pending Jay's priority call

Standing by for new tasks. — OWL 🦉
